label: Rule def
description: A BaseGen symbol resolver definition. Provides a named set of SymbolResolvers that the base generation system dispatches when the symbol is encountered.

symbol.label: Symbol
symbol.description: The BaseGen symbol name this def responds to. Multiple RuleDefs may share the same symbol; one is selected by weighted random at generation time.

resolvers.label: Resolvers
resolvers.description: Ordered list of SymbolResolvers that implement the generation logic for this symbol. Each list item carries a Class attribute that selects the concrete resolver subclass.
